name: Investigation
tagline: Read scenes and people to uncover critical clues.

baseAbility.name: Analyze
baseAbility.description: Spend a standard action and a skill check (Perception or Sense Motive, DC based on the target's Bluff/Will/BAB, whichever is highest) to study a creature. A simple analysis reveals their conditions, any mind-affecting effects and current emotional state, plus one rounded-off statistic (ability modifier, BAB, caster level, a save DC, or a skill modifier). Beating the DC by 5 or more (detailed analysis) reveals exact details of those conditions and two exact statistics instead of one rounded one, plus whether they're using a skill sphere approach and which one.

talents.name: Object Reading
talents.description: New (analyze) option: study an object to learn about its previous owner - race, gender, age, general use, and how they lost it - using Appraise, Sense Motive, or Spellcraft.

talents.name: Search Sense
talents.description: New (analyze) option: study a creature, container, or area to learn what's stored or hidden within it, down to exact items with a detailed result.

talents.name: Reliable Analysis
talents.description: Combine analyzing a creature with scouting it (if you have the Scout sphere) for more consistent, reliable results on rolls that benefit from either.

talents.name: Quick Study
talents.description: Reduce the action cost to perform an analysis, eventually down to a move or swift action.

talents.name: Analyze Group
talents.description: Analyze multiple creatures at once with a single check, rather than needing a separate action per target.

talents.name: Retained Insight
talents.description: Remember the results of a past analysis on a specific individual even after the normal duration would have expired.

talents.name: Weakness Sense
talents.description: New (analyze) option: learn a target's weakest saving throw or a damage type they're vulnerable to.

talents.name: Cold Read
talents.description: Attempt a lesser version of analyze against a target purely from a description or secondhand account, without needing them present.
